@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried only a limited subset of the data (SELECT book_id, details FROM books_info LIMIT 200) and computed the result on this sample, so its final answer ("1980s") reflects an incomplete dataset rather than the full corpus where the correct decade is 2020.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python calls (call_LkBt1B1cNYYWIMtyZ6MiGzU8 and call_yOkqrE3bT2B6QYqMkGSXZ3ll), the agent computed per-book average ratings and then took an unweighted mean across books per decade (after filtering decades with ≥10 books), instead of averaging all individual review ratings per decade, which led it to choose "1980s" rather than the ground-truth "2020".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent truncated the books data by querying only 200 rows from books_info (SELECT book_id, title, details FROM books_info LIMIT 200) and then computed decade statistics on this incomplete set, causing no decade to reach 10 distinct books and returning null instead of the correct decade (2020).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the result using only a small, truncated sample by querying both books_info and review tables with LIMIT 200 and then proceeding to aggregate on this subset (see query_db calls and subsequent execute_python), adding an unwarranted constraint that led to the incorrect decade "2010s" instead of the true "2020".
